evidence_hint: src/schema.ts:14 and src/namespace.ts:4 both declare SharingScope='private'|'shared'|'agnostic'. resolveNamespace returns namespace.SharingScope; normalize_meta.ts:48 re-casts `sharing_scope: sharingScope as SharingScope` (schema's type).
residual_if_not_resolved: Define SharingScope once in schema.ts, import into namespace.ts; remove the `as SharingScope` cast so the type flows structurally.
